error_signature: not getting expected results from OpenAI Chat node
title: Unexpected results from OpenAI Chat node when simulating conversation
symptom: The user is unable to simulate a multi-turn conversation in the OpenAI Chat node, resulting in unexpected output. Instead of receiving intermediate replies, the responses are combined into a single block of text.
applies_when: Trying to simulate a multi-turn conversation
not_this_if: Not using the AI Agent node
root_cause: The OpenAI Chat node processes input differently when multiple messages are sent as a single prompt. To achieve a multi-turn conversation, each message must be processed individually, allowing the model to respond to each turn in context.
fix_steps: Replace the Basic LLM Chain node with an AI Agent node that supports memory.
Split the array of messages so that each message is processed individually.
Manage the Session ID for memory to maintain context across messages.
agent_instruction: Use an AI Agent node and process each message individually to simulate a conversation.
